entity.title: Landscape Design

body.processed:
Our landscape architects create comprehensive designs that balance beauty, function, and sustainability. Using 3D modeling and plant science expertise, we develop plans that account for soil conditions, sun exposure, drainage, and your long-term maintenance preferences.

What's Included

  • On-site property assessment and soil analysis
  • 3D rendered design concepts
  • Plant selection and placement planning
  • Irrigation and lighting integration
  • Phased implementation roadmap
body.summary: Our landscape architects create comprehensive designs that balance beauty, function, and sustainability. Using 3D modeling and plant science expertise, we develop plans that account for soil condition

entity.summary: Custom landscape architecture with 3D renderings and phased implementation plans.

image.alt: Beautifully designed landscape with stone pathway and garden beds

entity.title: Hardscaping & Stonework

body.processed:
Create lasting outdoor structures with our expert hardscaping services. From elegant patios and retaining walls to custom fire pits and outdoor kitchens, our masons work with natural stone, pavers, and concrete to build features that stand the test of time.

Our Hardscape Services

  • Patios and walkways
  • Retaining walls and terracing
  • Outdoor kitchens and fire features
  • Water features and fountains
  • Driveways and parking areas

entity.title: Lawn Care & Maintenance

body.processed:
Keep your property looking its best year-round with our comprehensive maintenance programs. Our trained crews handle mowing, edging, fertilization, aeration, and seasonal clean-ups so you can enjoy your outdoor space without the work.

Maintenance Plans

  • Weekly mowing and edging
  • Seasonal fertilization program
  • Core aeration and overseeding
  • Spring and fall clean-ups
  • Shrub and tree pruning

entity.summary: Weekly mowing, fertilization, seasonal clean-ups, and comprehensive lawn health programs.

image.alt: Perfectly maintained green lawn with trimmed hedges

entity.title: Irrigation Systems

body.processed:
Efficient watering is essential for a healthy landscape. We design and install smart irrigation systems that deliver the right amount of water to each zone, reducing waste and keeping your plants thriving through every season.

System Features

  • Smart controller with weather-based adjustments
  • Drip and spray zone design
  • Rain sensors and moisture monitors
  • Seasonal system maintenance
  • Winterization and spring start-up

entity.summary: Smart irrigation design, installation, and seasonal maintenance programs.

image.alt: Garden sprinkler system watering a green lawn

body.processed:
A complete transformation of a two-acre estate property featuring formal gardens, a natural swimming pool, and extensive native plantings. The design integrates the existing mature oak trees with new garden rooms that unfold as visitors explore the grounds.

The project included a custom stone terrace with built-in seating, a cutting garden for fresh flowers, and a meditation garden with a Japanese-inspired water feature.

image.alt: Expansive estate garden with manicured lawns and stone pathways

gallery.alt: Garden pathway lined with flowering plants

body.processed:
An urban oasis built on a 4,000-square-foot commercial rooftop. We designed a wind-resistant planting scheme with drought-tolerant ornamental grasses, evergreen shrubs, and seasonal perennials in custom raised planters with integrated irrigation.

The space includes a dining area, a lounge with fire table, and a private garden nook. All plantings were selected for their tolerance to rooftop conditions including wind exposure and temperature extremes.

image.alt: Rooftop garden with city skyline views

body.processed:
A resort-inspired pool surround featuring natural stone coping, a custom spa, and lush tropical plantings. The design created distinct zones for sunbathing, dining, and relaxation while maintaining privacy with strategic screening plants.

A pergola with climbing wisteria provides shade over the outdoor dining area, and landscape lighting extends the usability of the space well into the evening hours.

body.processed: After years of struggling with bare patches and weeds, we signed up for Evergreen's maintenance plan. Within one season, our lawn was the greenest on the block. Their fertilization program and consistent care made all the difference. Worth every penny.

body.processed:
Founded in 1999 by master landscaper Robert Greenfield, Evergreen Landscapes has grown from a small lawn care operation into one of the region's most respected full-service landscaping companies. Our team of 45 professionals includes certified landscape architects, horticulturists, and skilled craftsmen.

Our Philosophy

We believe every outdoor space has untapped potential. Our approach combines artistic design with horticultural science to create landscapes that are beautiful, sustainable, and tailored to each client's lifestyle. We use native and adapted plants whenever possible to reduce water usage and support local ecosystems.

Certifications

Our team holds certifications from the National Association of Landscape Professionals, the Irrigation Association, and the Interlocking Concrete Pavement Institute. We are fully licensed and insured in New York, Connecticut, and New Jersey.
